scenes.speech: Let's try using ChatGPT! Let's explore what it can do together!
scenes.title: Let's Use ChatGPT

scenes.speech: The champion of conversational AI assistants!
scenes.title: What is ChatGPT?
scenes.content: ChatGPT is a conversational AI made by OpenAI. It can answer questions, write text, create code, and translate — all in one!

scenes.speech: How you instruct AI makes all the difference!
scenes.title: Writing Prompts
scenes.content: 'Explain for a 10-year-old', 'Give me 5 bullet points', 'Include a specific example'... more specific prompts get better answers!

scenes.speech: ChatGPT can be the ultimate tutor!
scenes.title: Using It for Learning
scenes.content: Ask anything you don't understand and it explains clearly. Say 'simpler please' or 'give an example' to adjust!

scenes.speech: Create stories and poems with AI!
scenes.title: Using It for Creativity
scenes.content: Novels, poetry, scripts, lyrics... share your idea and AI helps create. Human creativity × AI power!

scenes.title: Writing Code
scenes.content: Say 'write a calculator in Python' and it writes the code. Paste error messages and say 'fix this' — done!

scenes.speech: Not everything AI says is correct!
scenes.title: Fact-Checking is Essential
scenes.content: ChatGPT can confidently say wrong things (hallucination). Always verify important information from reliable sources!

scenes.title: Plugins and GPTs
scenes.content: Create custom GPTs or extend functionality with plugins. Build your own personalized AI assistant!

scenes.speech: Using AI wisely is the skill of the future!
scenes.title: Using AI Wisely
scenes.content: AI is a tool. If the person using it isn't smart, it won't help. Partner with AI and focus on what only humans can do!
scenes.highlight: 🤖 AI power × 💪 Human wisdom = Dream team

scenes.speech: You're getting good at using ChatGPT! Great work!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
